description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.13.1-bookworm Docker image and runs a before_script installing mkdocs, mkdocs-material, and mkdocs-git-revision-date-localized-plugin via pip. Define a pages job (implicitly in the deploy stage) that executes the shell commands `mkdocs build` and `mv site public`, then publishes the `public` directory as a pages artifact. Configure the pages job to run only on the master branch, deploying the built site to GitLab Pages. No additional caches, variables, or services are required.
